'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 3''' was the third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 16]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[David Bailey]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Jim Swallow]] and [[Iain Lowson]]. It also contained original illustrations by [[Carl Lyons]].

==Contents==
:'''Battles & Events''':
:*[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|The Naboo Blockade]] {{C|NAB 1-4}}
:*:<small>The Blockade of the peaceful planet by the Trade Federation. </small>
:'''Characters''': 
:*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] {{C|VAD 1-6}}
:*:<small>Dark Lord of the Sith who acted as right-hand man to the Emperor.</small>
:*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] {{C|ACK 1-4}}
:*:<small>Master strategist from Mon Calamari, fleet leader at the battle of Endor.</small>
:'''Planets & Locations''': 
:*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] {{C|TAT 1-4}}
:*:<small>The inhospitable desert planet that was home to Luke Skywalker.</small>
:'''Droids''': 
:*Imperial [[Mark IV sentry droid/Legends|Mark IV sentry droid]] {{C|SEN 1-2}}
:*:<small>Ubiquitous Imperial robot snooper.</small>
:'''Weapons & Technology''': 
:*[[Force detector|Jedi detection devices]] {{C|JED 1-2}}
:*:<small>Equipment used by the Jedi to assess potential recruits to their order.</small>
:'''Vehicles''': 
:*[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All-Terrain Armored Transport]] {{C|ATA 1-2}}
:*:<small>Feared battlewagon of the Imperial forces.</small>

==Development==
The admiral Ackbar article includes original artwork by [[Carl Lyons]].<ref name="Issue" />
